features: Windows 更新链路支持按 channel 分流并根据 package_type 区分安装包与应用内更新包
User agreement and privacy policy on login
JIT data sync with freshness check
Report field rename and export fixes
Scheduled analysis completion emails now include actual result attachments
config_changes: UPDATE_CHECK_CHANNEL added for stable/test release channel selection
Update UI and API now branch by package_type to distinguish installer vs update package
